folders.label: Eventeny
folders.expected: Ticket exports, vendor applications, sponsor applications, orders, maps, messages
folders.handler: Normalize to tickets, vendors, sponsors, commerce, and comms records

folders.label: QuickBooks
folders.expected: Company info, customers, vendors, invoices, payments, bills, reports
folders.handler: Validate against QuickBooks mapping before finance/admin sync

folders.label: Finance
folders.expected: Budgets, sponsor packages, reconciliations, raffle, merch, grant totals
folders.handler: Stage for finance review and source-of-truth decision

folders.label: Operations
folders.expected: Runbooks, maps, permits, staffing plans, emergency plans, load-in docs
folders.handler: Split into zones, policies, tasks, contacts, and incident playbooks

folders.label: Documents
folders.expected: PDFs, docs, board packets, sponsorship packets, public/private references
folders.handler: Extract text, preserve source, route to canonical records

folders.label: Comms
folders.expected: Email exports, social calendars, press releases, SMS templates, announcements
folders.handler: Classify by audience and approval state before publishing
